data.title: Natural Field Releases Research Findings on NFTriSolve® Co-Loading Liposome Technology
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on April 28, 2026, Natural Field revealed groundbreaking advancements in its NFTriSolve® co-loading liposome technology. Their latest four-component formulation exhibited promising results in zebrafish model studies, indicating a major breakthrough. This innovative formulation combines various elements to enhance efficacy. This development marks a crucial step forward in the field of liposome technology.
Smithfield Foods records best-ever Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings.

data.title: Serstech secures 10 MSEK loan from Almi
data.description: Serstech has secured a loan of 10 million SEK from Almi. The funding will be allocated towards expanding inventory of components and finished goods to meet expected demand. The loan, carrying an interest rate of 8.12%, is set to be repaid by December 31, 2026.

data.title: ETC’s Aerospace and Commercial/Industrial Units Awarded Contracts of Approximately $37 Million
data.description: In Southampton, Pennsylvania, on April 28, 2026, Environmental Tectonics Corporation disclosed that its Aerospace Solutions Segment, known as ETC, secured contracts totaling around $31 million. These contracts are for providing Aircrew Training Systems ("ATS") to two global clients. The agreements also encompass various Aeromedical products.

data.title: EQT Real Estate Europe Logistics Value Fund V holds final close at its hard-cap, raising EUR 3.1 billion in total commitments
data.description: The largest pan-European closed-ended real estate fund to date has been successfully raised, garnering a total of EUR 3.1 billion in commitments. This includes EUR 3.0 billion in fee-generating assets under management, surpassing its initial target of EUR 2.5 billion by 42%.

data.title: European ServiceNow Strategies Focus on AI, Sovereignty
data.description: In London, European companies are increasingly centralizing functions using the ServiceNow platform, connecting it with essential systems to facilitate the deployment of artificial intelligence. This trend highlights a strategic shift towards streamlining operations and leveraging technology to enhance efficiency and innovation.

data.title: Toast Launches Toast Go® 3 Handheld Point-of-Sale Device Globally
data.description: London-based company Toast has unveiled its latest product, the Toast Go® 3 handheld point-of-sale (POS) device, in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Canada, and Australia. This launch builds on Toast’s track record of innovation in the industry, having processed billions of orders. The device is designed to assist restaurant and retail operators in providing consistent, top-notch guest experiences in the face of evolving operational challenges. The Toast Go® 3 is tailored for fast-paced settings, offering durability, smart workflows, and resilience.

data.title: Braskem to Showcase Sustainable Packaging Solutions at interpack 2026
data.description: Braskem, the leading polyolefins producer in the Americas and a key global player in biopolymers, will showcase their packaging solutions at interpack 2026 in Düsseldorf, Germany. The event will take place in hall 9, booth A32. Braskem offers products made from bio-based, recycled, and traditional polyolefins to promote circular plastics initiatives. The company will feature their I’m green™ bio-based polyethylene grades at the event. Braskem's stock is listed on B3 under BRKM3, BRKM5, and BRKM6, on NYSE as BAK, and on LATIBEX as XBRK.

data.title: New Omdia Research States That Cellular IoT Data Traffic Will Reach 218.6 Exabytes by 2035
data.description: In London, data traffic from cellular IoT connections is projected to reach 218.6 exabytes (EB) by 2035 as per recent Omdia research findings. The surge is attributed to the increasing need for data analysis to enhance operational efficiency and generate fresh revenue streams for companies. The research highlights that a significant portion of cellular IoT data traffic will originate from the automotive industry, focusing on applications like infotainment services.

data.title: Ivonescimab Receives Major Recommendations Across Multiple Therapies in the 2026 CSCO NSCLC Guideline
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Hong Kong, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) revealed that ivonescimab, their groundbreaking PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, has obtained significant enhancements and advancements in various treatment settings. The company's innovative drug has received widespread recognition and improvements for both initial and subsequent treatment stages.
ECB: Economic growth seen at -2.1% in year ahead vs -0.9% seen a month earlier.
ECB: One year ahead inflation expectations rise to 4.0% in March from 2.5% in Feb.
ECB: Inflation expectations 3 years ahead at 3.0% vs 2.5%, 5 years ahead rise to 2.4% from 2.3%.

data.title: Public safety takes priority as Boldyn, EE and TfL deploy Emergency Services Network infrastructure across the London Underground
data.description: In London on April 28, 2026, Boldyn Networks (Boldyn) announced their selection to provide 4G mobile network infrastructure for the Emergency Services Network (ESN) throughout the London Underground. This upgrade is a significant move towards enhancing public safety in London and ensuring connectivity for emergency services personnel.
